entities.name: user
entities.context: the individual whose expectations are involved

entities.name: recipe automation
entities.context: a process that may be expected by the user

entities.name: manual execution
entities.context: the alternative to recipe automation expected by the user

relationships.context: the user may believe that recipe automation is necessary
the user may believe that manual execution is sufficient
automation may involve a specific output format
manual execution should still reference the output format
